title: Tell It Another Way Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Related to a specific place or area near you.
choices: local
rural
colonial
rounds.answer: local
rounds.explanation: local: Related to a specific place or area near you.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: When a group enters a place and takes control, often by force.
choices: local
rural
invasion
rounds.answer: invasion
rounds.explanation: invasion: When a group enters a place and takes control, often by force.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: An amount that is more than what is needed.
choices: rural
surplus
local
rounds.answer: surplus
rounds.explanation: surplus: An amount that is more than what is needed.

games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: In this activity, one person sits in the "hot seat" and pretends to be a character from the reading passage or from any story you have studied.
This is a fast, fun activity that practises your retelling skills under time pressure.
